MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF MALINKA TACUMA MOYE'S Motion For Judgement Statement Of Facts; Causes Of Action Stating Claim One Thru Thirty-Seven, Title 18 IS OFF CALENDAR BECAUSE THE CASE IS STAYED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH PREFILING ORDERS UNDER C C P SECTION 391.7 AND BECAUSE IT WAS NOT SERVED WITH SUFFICIENT NOTICE. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- MALINKA MOYE, TEL. NO. 608-1518, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. The Court cannot now say that there is no possibility that the plaintiff would be unable to state a claim. No opposition filed. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order.
